case_title: SADIZK ISAULA VS. KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISAULA, SADIZK AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISAULA, SADIZK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $20,389.65 PRINCIPAL, $430.03 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,189.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
